title: AgentWatch – Prevent runaway AI agents with runtime budget enforcement
abstract:
Hi HN,
I’m a solo developer and built AgentWatch to solve a problem I kept running into while building AI agents: preventing runaway loops and unexpected LLM spend before requests reach the model.
AgentWatch sits in front of OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, Groq, and others to enfor
abstract_zh: 嘿，各位！我是个独乐乐的开发者，最近在给AI代理搭桥接木时遇到了个头疼的问题——那就是那些无脑乱转、烧钱不眨眼的循环和大语言模型（LLM）。于是我就开发了AgentWatch，就像个贴心管家一样，在你还没来得及喊“救命”前就把它们关掉。无论是OpenAI还是Anthropic，甚至是Gemini和Bedrock，统统hold住！让你们的钱包也能喘口气。
